generation.subject: Apex Hotels + Corporate Sales + Booking Channels
generation.body:
Hi Anja,

Hope you’re well :)

I came across Apex Hotels as part of some research I’m doing at Imperial College London into hospitality operations, particularly around inbound guest email and reservations workflow. My partner Cole’s family is active in hotel ownership and operations in South Africa, so we have a close view of the operational challenges.

Your role as Senior Corporate Sales Manager looks like an ideal perspective given how directly it connects to booking channels, distribution and client comms.

I’d love to ask you a few focused questions if you might have 10 minutes sometime in the coming week.

Best,
Ansh Arora
